title: Almanach — SceneryStack Knowledge Base
description: A file-based wiki of SceneryStack knowledge: API guides, software patterns, styling, and accessibility conventions for building interactive simulations. Every page is plain Markdown with structured frontmatter.

documents.title: Installation and Setup
documents.description: Setting up a new SceneryStack project - npm install, TypeScript config, and dev tooling.

documents.title: Project Structure Conventions
documents.description: Standard folder/file layout of a SceneryStack repo (model/view split, strings, images).

documents.title: Running and Building a Simulation
documents.description: Dev server workflow and production build output for a SceneryStack sim.

documents.title: Scenery Application vs. Standalone Library
documents.description: Choosing between a full joist-based Sim application and using scenery as a standalone rendering library.

documents.title: Supported Browsers
documents.description: Browser/platform support matrix and graceful-degradation considerations.

documents.title: What is SceneryStack?
documents.description: Overview of the SceneryStack framework, its constituent libraries, and how to install and import it.

documents.title: Your First Simulation
documents.description: Scaffolding a minimal one-screen simulation with Sim, Screen, and ScreenView.

documents.title: Accessible Interaction Tutorial
documents.description: Making a custom draggable Node fully accessible end-to-end.

documents.title: Building Your First Screen
documents.description: Step-by-step model/view/Screen wiring for a new screen in a multi-screen sim.

documents.title: Modifying SceneryStack
documents.description: Workflow for patching or contributing to the underlying common-code libraries.

documents.title: PhET-iO and Instrumentation
documents.description: Conceptual guide to PhET-iO - what instrumentation buys you and how Tandem fits in.

documents.title: Preferences and Feature Flags
documents.description: Using the Preferences dialog and query parameters to configure sim behavior.

documents.title: Scenery Basics
documents.description: Introduction to the scene graph - the Node tree, render layers, and coordinate frames.

documents.title: Scenery Input
documents.description: Overview of scenery's input system - pointers, listeners, and event phases.

documents.title: Scenery Layout
documents.description: Overview of scenery's auto-layout system - FlowBox, GridBox, AlignBox, and layout options.

documents.title: Translation and Localization
documents.description: String management with StringProperty and the PhET translation pipeline.

documents.title: UI Components Overview
documents.description: Tour of the sun and scenery-phet component libraries and when to reach for each.

documents.title: BooleanProperty
documents.description: A Property<boolean> with a toggle() convenience method.

documents.title: DerivedProperty
documents.description: A read-only Property computed from one or more dependencies.

documents.title: Emitter
documents.description: Discrete events that are not state.

documents.title: EnumerationProperty
documents.description: A Property restricted to the values of an EnumerationValue subclass.

documents.title: Multilink
documents.description: Reacting to several Properties at once without manually chaining links.

documents.title: NumberProperty
documents.description: A Property<number> with an optional range for validation and UI binding.

documents.title: Observable Array
documents.description: createObservableArray: a Property-like array with add/remove item emitters.

documents.title: Property
documents.description: The base observable value wrapper underlying all reactive state.

documents.title: StringProperty
documents.description: A Property<string>'s role in localizable, translatable values.

documents.title: Bounds2
documents.description: An axis-aligned rectangle used for layout, drag bounds, and hit-testing.

documents.title: Matrix3
documents.description: The 3x3 transform matrix behind Node transforms and ModelViewTransform2.

documents.title: Range
documents.description: A min/max pair used for NumberProperty validation and slider ranges.

documents.title: Utils
documents.description: dot's numeric helper functions: clamp, linear, roundSymmetric, and friends.

documents.title: Vector2
documents.description: The 2D vector/point class used throughout SceneryStack's math and positioning APIs.

documents.title: Vector3
documents.description: The 3D vector class used for color math and 3D-flavored simulations.

documents.title: Screen
documents.description: Pairing a model factory and view factory into one selectable unit of a Sim.

documents.title: ScreenView
documents.description: The root Node of a Screen's view, with layoutBounds and visibleBoundsProperty.

documents.title: Sim
documents.description: The top-level application object owning Screens, the navigation bar, and the sim loop.

documents.title: Shape
documents.description: kite's path-description class behind Path, and its common construction/query methods.

documents.title: ModelViewTransform2
documents.description: Mapping between model coordinates (physical units, y-up) and view coordinates (pixels, y-down) with ModelViewTransform2.

documents.title: AlignBox
documents.description: A single-child container for alignment and fixed-size placement within layouts.

documents.title: Circle
documents.description: A Path subclass for drawing circles by radius.

documents.title: Display
documents.description: The root object that turns a Node tree into rendered/attached DOM output.

documents.title: FlowBox
documents.description: A single-axis (row/column) auto-layout container.

documents.title: GridBox
documents.description: A two-dimensional grid auto-layout container.

documents.title: Image
documents.description: A Node that renders a raster image with optional Property-driven swapping.

documents.title: Line
documents.description: A Path subclass for drawing single line segments.

documents.title: Node
documents.description: The base class of every item in the scene graph and its core options.

documents.title: Path
documents.description: A Node that renders a kite Shape with fill/stroke.

documents.title: PressListener and FireListener
documents.description: The base classes behind clickable/pressable Nodes.

documents.title: Rectangle
documents.description: A Path subclass for drawing (optionally rounded) rectangles.

documents.title: RichText
documents.description: A Text-like Node supporting a constrained markup subset for mixed styling.

documents.title: Text
documents.description: A Node that renders a single string of plain text.

documents.title: ArrowNode
documents.description: A configurable arrow shape used for vectors, force diagrams, and callouts.

documents.title: NumberControl
documents.description: A composite slider + label + value-readout control bound to a NumberProperty.

documents.title: PhetFont
documents.description: The standard font class used across every SceneryStack simulation.

documents.title: ResetAllButton
documents.description: The standard circular reset control wired to a model's reset() method.

documents.title: StopwatchNode
documents.description: A draggable digital stopwatch bound to a Stopwatch model element.

documents.title: ThermometerNode
documents.description: A fluid-level thermometer visualization bound to a temperature Property.

documents.title: TimeControlNode
documents.description: The standard play/pause/step-forward control for time-based simulations.

documents.title: AccordionBox
documents.description: An expandable/collapsible titled container bound to an expandedProperty.

documents.title: Checkbox
documents.description: A checkbox bound to a BooleanProperty, with label-Node composition.

documents.title: ComboBox
documents.description: A dropdown selector bound to a Property over an enumerated set of items.

documents.title: HSlider
documents.description: The horizontal slider bound to a NumberProperty and Range.

documents.title: Panel
documents.description: A bordered/background container used to group related controls.

documents.title: Radio Button Groups
documents.description: Mutually-exclusive selection bound to a Property (rectangular and Aqua styles).

documents.title: RectangularPushButton
documents.description: The standard rectangular momentary-action button.

documents.title: TextPushButton
documents.description: A push button whose content is a text label.

documents.title: Toggle Buttons
documents.description: The rectangular/round toggle-button family bound to a BooleanProperty or two-state value.

documents.title: Tandem
documents.description: The naming/instrumentation handle giving every PhET-iO-tracked element a stable tree address.

documents.title: Animation and Easing
documents.description: Animating a Property's value smoothly over time instead of setting it instantly.

documents.title: Dispose and Memory Management
documents.description: The dispose() convention - when Nodes/Properties/listeners must clean up.

documents.title: Drag Listeners
documents.description: Making nodes draggable with DragListener, KeyboardDragListener, and RichDragListener, wired to a model positionProperty through a transform.

documents.title: Emitter vs. Property
documents.description: When to model state as a Property versus a discrete event as an Emitter.

documents.title: Model-View Separation
documents.description: The foundational SceneryStack architecture - axon Properties form the model, scenery Nodes observe it, and nothing flows the other way.

documents.title: Multi-Screen Sim Structure
documents.description: Structuring model/view code across multiple Screens in one Sim.

documents.title: PhET-iO Instrumentation Pattern
documents.description: Deciding what to instrument with Tandem and structuring a PhET-iO-ready model.

documents.title: Query Parameters Pattern
documents.description: Using query parameters to drive optional/debug behavior.

documents.title: The Enumeration Pattern
documents.description: Modeling closed sets of values instead of string literals.

documents.title: The Multilink Pattern
documents.description: Combining multiple Properties into one derived reaction.

documents.title: The Options Pattern
documents.description: The options-object convention for configuring Nodes and components.

documents.title: The Reset-All Pattern
documents.description: Wiring every model Property's reset() through one ResetAllButton.

documents.title: Color Profiles
documents.description: Centralizing colors with ProfileColorProperty so an application can switch between default and projector color schemes at runtime.

documents.title: Iconography Conventions
documents.description: Building consistent icons for buttons and controls.

documents.title: Layout Container Conventions
documents.description: Styling conventions when composing FlowBox/GridBox/AlignBox layouts.

documents.title: Panels and Backgrounds
documents.description: Conventions for grouping controls with Panel/AccordionBox.

documents.title: Stroke and Line Styling
documents.description: Conventions for stroke width, dash patterns, and line joins/caps.

documents.title: Typography and Fonts
documents.description: Using PhetFont consistently and font-size/weight conventions.

documents.title: Alternative Input Overview
documents.description: How pointer, keyboard, and switch/AT input all route through the same listeners.

documents.title: Describing Dynamic State
documents.description: Writing description content that updates as model state changes.

documents.title: Focus Highlights
documents.description: Customizing focus highlights for focusable Nodes.

documents.title: Keyboard Input and Hotkeys
documents.description: KeyboardListener and Hotkey for custom keyboard shortcuts beyond dragging.

documents.title: Sound Design
documents.description: Using scenery-phet/tambo sound generators for non-speech audio feedback.

documents.title: The Parallel DOM (PDOM)
documents.description: How scenery renders an invisible, semantic HTML tree alongside the canvas so screen readers and keyboards can use the application.

documents.title: Voicing
documents.description: Speech-synthesis descriptions triggered by interaction, layered on the PDOM.

documents.title: Accessible Control Panel Example
documents.description: A fully accessible control panel combining sun components with PDOM.

documents.title: Building a Two-Screen Simulation
documents.description: Full example wiring two Screens with shared and per-screen model code.

documents.title: Demo Simulation Walkthrough
documents.description: Annotated tour of a minimal end-to-end demo sim.

documents.title: PhET-iO Instrumented Sim Example
documents.description: A minimal simulation instrumented end-to-end with Tandem.

documents.title: Scenery Layout Examples
documents.description: Worked FlowBox/GridBox layouts for common UI arrangements.

documents.title: Standalone Scenery App Example
documents.description: Using scenery as a standalone rendering library outside the joist shell.

documents.title: Three.js Integration
documents.description: Embedding a Three.js WebGL scene inside a scenery Node.

documents.title: Authoring Guide
documents.description: Conventions for adding documents to this wiki - folder taxonomy, required frontmatter schema, and how the generated indexes work.

documents.title: Page Template
documents.description: A copy-pasteable frontmatter and section skeleton for authors starting a new wiki page.

documents.title: Roadmap
documents.description: The phased plan for growing Almanach from a handful of pages to a comprehensive SceneryStack wiki, and how to track and claim work against it.
